isolation.boundary: repo plus assigned evidence/report paths only
isolation.concurrency: no concurrent validators for this flow

assertions.reason: The exact assigned cargo validation command exited successfully. The `openai-agents` voice semantics test target passed all 6 tests, and the chained `agents-voice` library suite passed all 18 tests with no failures.

evidence.command: cargo test -q -p openai-agents --test voice_semantics && cargo test -q -p agents-voice --lib
evidence.details: `voice_semantics` reported `6 passed; 0 failed`; chained `agents-voice --lib` reported `18 passed; 0 failed`.

evidence.summary: Terminal output for the exact `openai-agents` voice semantics command.
Terminal output for the chained `agents-voice --lib` command that also supports this assertion.

assertions.reason: The exact assigned `cargo test -q -p agents-voice --lib` command was executed directly for this assertion and exited successfully with 18 passing tests and no failures.

evidence.details: The direct assertion run reported `18 passed; 0 failed`. The same suite also ran successfully as part of VAL-VO-001's chained command.

evidence.summary: Terminal output for the direct assertion command.

frictions: `cargo test -q` only emitted aggregate pass counts, so supplemental `-- --list` captures were recorded to map the passing suites back to the named validation behaviors.
summary: Validated VAL-VO-001 and VAL-VO-002 through the assigned cargo surface. Both assertions passed: `voice_semantics` passed 6/6 tests and `agents-voice --lib` passed 18/18 tests on both the chained and direct runs.
